headline: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Should You Buy?
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Does Stanley Black & Decker's (SWK) CEO Shift and Margin Goal Clarify Its Long-Term Strategy?
summary: Stanley Black & Decker recently announced that CEO Donald Allan will move to Executive Chair and Chris Nelson will become CEO on October 1, while management continues to execute a multi-year supply chain transformation and cost-savings program aimed at lifting margins. Alongside confirming that recent tariff changes are not expected to materially affect its full-year guidance, the company reaffirmed its focus on achieving about 35% gross margins through ongoing efficiency gains, innovation,...
